predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased). This background status may be directly asserted in a case.

predicates.name: served_as_family_main_residence_at_estate_opening
predicates.description: The immovable property served as the main residence of the family at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: acquires_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires the right to the lease of the immovable property under article 4.20.

predicates.name: excluded_from_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The person (heir) is excluded from the right to the lease of the immovable property in favour of the surviving spouse.

predicates.name: is_sole_beneficiary_of_lease_right
predicates.description: The person is the sole beneficiary of the right to the lease of the immovable property.
